title: [FIRRTL] Remove empty modules in IMDCE
body:
This commit extends IMDCE to delete empty modules. A module is empty if
it doen't have any argument, operation and annotation.

Close https://github.com/llvm/circt/issues/3375.

Example:
```scala
circuit Foo:
  module Foo:
    inst other of Other

  module Other:
```
After:
```verilog
module Foo();	// foo.fir:2:10
endmodule
```
Before:
```verilog
module Foo();	// foo.fir:2:10
  Other other ();	// foo.fir:3:5
endmodule

module Other();	// foo.fir:5:10
endmodule
```
